event.task: Verify gateway/runtime health and bring all swarm workers online. Check each worker (swarm1-swarm12) for operational status — are they reachable, any broken lanes? Report which workers are ready and which need attention. If swarm1 (the parked broken lane) is still offline, note that explicitly. Ensure the local swarm environment is stable and all agents are operational. Use the multica-agents-pull skill if relevant to pull Hermes agents into the Multica workspace.
event.rationale: Ops/Health is the natural owner for 'bringing agents in' — verifying runtime status, checking gateway health, and ensuring agents are operational is swarm8's core mission.
